title_en: PhD Candidate · AI4Rad Lab · Shanghai Sixth People's Hospital
title_cn: 博士候选人 · AI4Rad Lab · 上海市第六人民医院
bio_en: PhD Candidate in Biomedical Engineering at University of Shanghai for Science and Technology (2025–present). Holds a Master's degree from Johns Hopkins University. Affiliated with AI4Rad Lab, Shanghai Sixth People's Hospital. Research interests include medical image segmentation, super-resolution reconstruction, and musculoskeletal imaging analysis.
bio_cn: 上海理工大学生物医学工程专业博士候选人（2025 年至今）。约翰斯·霍普金斯大学硕士。工作单位为上海市第六人民医院 AI4Rad Lab。研究方向包括医学影像分割、超分辨率重建与骨肌影像分析。
interests_en: Medical Image Segmentation — vascular and ischemic region segmentation in cardiac CT
Super-Resolution Reconstruction — CT image quality enhancement for lumbar spine imaging
Musculoskeletal Imaging Analysis — bone morphology assessment in CT scans
interests_cn: 医学影像分割 — 心脏 CT 血管与缺血区域分割
超分辨率重建 — 腰椎 CT 图像质量增强
骨肌影像分析 — CT 骨形态学评估
